appraisal_events.evidence: « Enfin le lendemain matin ... je reçus la dépêche de Robert de Saint-Loup: “de l'Orgeville ... petite, brune, boulotte, est en ce moment en Suisse.” Ce n'était pas elle ! »
appraisal_events.explanation: On the basis of Saint-Loup’s corrective telegram, the narrator retracts his prior association of the blonde with the scandal attached to the name he had remembered, effectively clearing Mlle d'Éporcheville of the brothel-linked identity he had inferred.

status_effects.explanation: Her local reputation improves because the narrator, informed by Saint-Loup’s message, concludes the woman he saw and the scandalous report do not correspond to her.
